title: Software Engineering Text Classification Essay
skills: ACADEMIC WRITING | Academic Writing | Machine Learning (ML) | Research Writing | Technical Writing | Artificial Intelligence | Natural Language Processing | Software Engineering
full_description:
I need a 2,000-word academic essay that critically examines text classification within software engineering. Please structure the discussion so it speaks to an audience of academics and researchers, weaving together three main threads:

• State-of-the-art algorithms and techniques currently used to classify software-related text (e.g., commit messages, bug reports, requirements documents). 
• Concrete applications and case studies that show these methods in action—think defect prediction, requirement traceability, code review prioritisation, or any other well-documented use you deem relevant. 
• Present challenges the field still faces (such as imbalanced datasets, domain shift, or explainability) and outline why these issues remain hard.

I’m looking for a balanced, evidence-based narrative rather than a simple survey list. Every claim should be supported by recent, high-quality literature, cited in proper APA style (7th ed.). Figures or tables are welcome if they help clarify comparisons, but keep them integral to the flow of the text rather than in appendices.

Deliverable: a polished, plagiarism-checked Word document of roughly 2000 words excluding references, formatted to standard academic conventions with an APA reference list.

title: Experienced Affiliate Manager Needed
skills: AFFILIATE MARKETING | Affiliate Marketing | Internet Marketing | Social Media Marketing | Email Marketing | Performance Management | Business Development | Digital Marketing | Influencer Marketing | Project Management | Content Marketing
full_description:
We are looking for an experienced affiliate manager to help grow a global affiliate network by recruiting, onboarding, activating, and supporting publishers, affiliates, media buyers, influencers, content creators, coupon partners, review sites, communities, and partner networks. The selected candidate will start with a three-month trial on a monthly retainer basis; thereafter, based on their performance, we will increase the retainer fee to support a continued long-term relationship.

The main goal of this role is to increase the number of active publishers, improve affiliate engagement, support campaign adoption, and help the network start generating revenue faster through strong affiliate recruitment and activation.

This is a hands-on role. We are not looking for someone who only manages basic communication. We need someone proactive, fast, organized, commercially sharp, and highly focused on results.

Key responsibilities
Affiliate recruitment

You will be responsible for identifying, approaching, and recruiting relevant affiliates and publishers across global markets.

Tasks include:

Researching potential publishers, affiliates, influencers, bloggers, media buyers, coupon sites, cashback sites, comparison sites, review sites, content creators, niche communities, and partner networks
Building targeted affiliate prospect lists by niche, GEO, traffic type, audience, and promotion method
Recruiting affiliates across categories such as eCommerce, SaaS, finance, health, beauty, travel, education, lifestyle, home, B2B, lead generation, and other suitable verticals
Creating personalized outreach messages
Sending outreach and follow-up messages
Explaining the value of joining the network
Encouraging affiliates to register and complete onboarding
Identifying high-potential partners in the USA, Europe, MENA, APAC, India, and other global markets
Affiliate activation

Recruiting affiliates is only the first step. The selected candidate must be strong at activating publishers and helping them start promoting campaigns.

Tasks include:

Communicating with newly joined publishers quickly
Helping affiliates choose suitable campaigns based on niche, traffic source, audience, and GEO
Guiding publishers on how to find offers, generate tracking links, use Smartlinks, and start promotions
Following up with inactive affiliates and encouraging them to launch campaigns
Sharing campaign recommendations with publishers
Helping affiliates understand payouts, campaign objectives, GEO targeting, approved offers, featured offers, deep links, Smartlinks, coupon codes, tracking links, postbacks, and reporting
Increasing the number of active and revenue-generating affiliates
Affiliate communication and support

Fast response time is very important for this role.

Responsibilities include:

Responding to affiliate emails and messages as quickly as possible
Answering affiliate questions clearly and professionally
Supporting affiliates with campaign selection, tracking links, approvals, payouts, postbacks, coupons, and reporting
Creating onboarding messages, activation emails, follow-up sequences, and campaign update messages
Sending regular updates about featured campaigns, approved offers, Smartlinks, and promotional opportunities
Keeping publishers engaged, informed, and motivated
Coming up with innovative ways to communicate with affiliates and improve activation
Merchant and partner network support

You will also help maintain strong relationships with merchants, advertisers, and partner networks.

Tasks include:

I need a clean, responsive e-commerce site focused exclusively on selling downloadable digital products. The core of the build is a solid user account management system so buyers can register, sign in, track their purchases, and re-download files whenever they need.

Acceptance criteria
– New users can register, log in, and update their profile. 
– Logged-in users can purchase a digital product and immediately find it in “My Downloads.” 
– Direct URL access to files without authentication is blocked. 
– Admin can create, edit, or retire a product from the dashboard. 

If you have a reusable template or framework that speeds things up while keeping code readable, feel free to suggest it. Let me know your preferred stack, an estimated timeline, and any clarifying questions you have.

title: Strait of Hormuz Energy Impact Analysis
skills: POWER BI | Power BI | Data Analysis | Data Modeling | Data Visualization | Research Writing | Research | Technical Writing | Business Analysis
full_description:
## Power BI Project Request – Strait of Hormuz Impact Dashboard

I am looking for a complete Power BI project for a university jury presentation.

### Project Topic

**Strait of Hormuz Impact Dashboard**

The project should analyze the importance of the Strait of Hormuz in global energy markets and the potential impact of disruptions on oil prices, energy security, and regional vulnerability.

This is a highly relevant and current geopolitical topic.

### Main Research Question

**How could disruptions in the Strait of Hormuz impact global oil markets, energy security, and regional vulnerability over time?**

### Sub-Questions

1. How have global oil prices evolved over time?
2. What percentage of global oil trade passes through the Strait of Hormuz?
3. Which countries and regions are most dependent on oil transported through the Strait of Hormuz?
4. How have geopolitical tensions in the region historically affected oil prices and energy markets?
5. Which countries and regions face the highest risk if the Strait of Hormuz is disrupted or closed?

### Requirements

The project must be built entirely in Power BI.

Please use:

* Power Query for data cleaning and transformation
* Proper data modeling (star schema if applicable)
* DAX measures and KPIs
* Time-series analysis
* Interactive dashboard design

### Deliverables

#### 1. Power BI File (.pbix)

Must include:

* Data cleaning in Power Query
* Data quality checks
* Data model
* DAX measures
* KPIs
* Time-series analysis
* Interactive dashboard

#### 2. Dashboard Pages

At minimum:

**Page 1 – Executive Overview**

* Key KPIs
* Global impact summary
* Oil market overview
* Regional risk indicators

**Page 2 – Time-Series Analysis**

* Oil price trends
* Historical events and impact
* Forecasting
* Trend analysis

**Page 3 – Regional Vulnerability Analysis**

* Maps
* Regional dependency analysis
* Risk assessment
* Country comparisons

#### 3. PowerPoint Presentation

A professional 20-minute presentation including:

* Introduction
* Research questions
* Dataset overview
* Data cleaning process
* Data model
* DAX measures
* Dashboard walkthrough
* Key findings
* Recommendations
* Conclusion
* Q&A preparation

#### 4. Documentation

A short document explaining:

* Why the datasets were selected
* Data cleaning steps
* Analysis techniques used
* Key insights
* Answers to the research questions

### Dataset Requirements

Please use reliable public sources such as:

* World Bank
* U.S. Energy Information Administration (EIA)
* International Energy Agency (IEA)
* IMF
* Our World in Data
* BP Statistical Review
* Other reputable public datasets

The datasets must contain a time component and enough historical data to support meaningful trend and time-series analysis.

### Goal

The goal is not to create an overly academic project.

The goal is to create a professional, business-oriented Power BI dashboard that demonstrates:

* Power Query skills
* Data modeling
* DAX
* Time intelligence
* Dashboard design
* Business storytelling

full_description:
I’m ready to build a full-stack intercity cab solution and need a team that can deliver four tightly-integrated components: 

1. Driver App (Android) 
 • Drivers receive trip notifications with all ride details the moment a dispatch manager assigns a job. 
 • Built-in navigation must optimise routes dynamically, taking toll plazas and state borders into account so the fare calculator can add toll tax, state tax and (where relevant) airport parking in real time. 
 • A clean earnings dashboard should let drivers track daily, weekly and monthly payouts and drill into Razorpay / Paytm settlement history.

2. Rider App (Android & iOS) 
 • Passengers can book or schedule rides ahead of time, pick vehicle category and view an upfront cost that already includes tolls, taxes and parking. 
 • Once the ride is active, they track their cab live on the map. 
 • After drop-off they rate the trip and review the driver.

3. Manual Dispatch Console 
 • Our operators manually assign trips, edit pickup or drop locations, override pricing when needed and push instant updates to driver and rider apps. 
 • The UI should surface live vehicle locations so dispatchers know which car to select.

4. Admin Panel 
 • Central hub to add, suspend or verify drivers and users. 
 • Real-time analytics: completed trips, revenue split, cancelled rides, average rating, heat maps. 
 • Full payment ledger with filters for Razorpay, Paytm and cash, plus export to CSV.

Additional integrations 
• SMS: we’ll provide API docs for our own gateway; system must trigger OTPs, status alerts and payment links. 
• Payment flows must follow Indian compliance rules (UPI intent flow, card tokenisation where required). 
• API layer needs to be modular so we can plug new gateways later without rewriting apps.

Deliverables 
• Source code for Android (Kotlin/Java) and iOS (Swift) apps, web admin and dispatch portals (React / Angular or similar). 
• REST / GraphQL backend with detailed API documentation. 
• Postman collection, environment files and a short video walk-through of key flows. 
• Deployment scripts for AWS or any mainstream cloud plus read-me on scaling and backups.

Acceptance Criteria 
✓ End-to-end booking to payment flow tested on sandbox Razorpay & Paytm. 
✓ Driver and rider see identical live location accuracy within 5 seconds. 
✓ Fare breakdown correctly itemises toll, state tax and airport parking. 
✓ Admin exports a payment report and it reconciles with gateway dashboard.

If your team has launched similar ride-hailing or logistics products and can meet these functional checkpoints, let’s discuss timelines and architecture choices.

title: مبرمج لتركيب وتعديل سكربت مهام واستثمار بشحن تلقائي رقمي ولوحة تحكم واحدة
skills: برمجة | تطوير البرمجيات | برمجة مواقع | برمجة قواعد البيانات
full_description: مرحباً، أريد إنشاء موقع ويب للمهام اليومية يعتمد على باقات ومناصب محددة وهي (C1, C2, B1...) بربح يومي مخصص لكل منصب وبدون نظام إحالات داخلي.تفاصيل العمل المطلوبة:الشحن والسحب: تلقائي بالكامل (Automated Crypto) عبر ربط الموقع ببوابة دفع عملات رقمية لتقبل عملة USDT، ليتعرف النظام تلقائياً على وصول الأموال وتحديث الرصيد لشراء المناصب.قوانين السحب والرسوم: مدة السحب محددة (من 1 إلى 72 ساعة)، ورسوم خدمة السحب الافتراضية تظهر لكل عضو بنسبة 21%.نظام المهام المتغير بالرموز: أيقونات منصات التواصل (يوتيوب، تيك توك، فيسبوك) تكون ثابته في الواجهة. ولكن أريد نظاماً يربط الروابط بالرموز اليومية؛ بحيث عندما يدخل العضو رمز المهمة اليومي (6 أرقام)، يقوم النظام تلقائياً بفتح "الرابط الجديد" المرتبط بهذا الرمز والذي قمت أنا بتحديده مسبقاً من لوحة التحكم، ليقوم العضو برفع لقطة الشاشة وتضاف له الأرباح تلقائياً بحسب منصبه.لوحة التحكم للمشرف: لوحة تحكم واحدة سهلة الاستخدام من الموبايل تتيح لي التحكم الكامل بـ (حظر/تعديل أرصدة ونقاط شرف الأعضاء يدوياً، إرسال المكافآت، إضافة الرموز اليومية وربط كل رمز برابط مهمة مختلف ومتجدد، وتعديل قيمة رسوم السحب الـ 21% وتغيير مدة الـ 72 ساعة في أي وقت بضغطة زر).ملاحظة:لدي فيديو لتسجيل الشاشة يوضح شكل القوائم والواجهات المطلوبة طبق الأصل، سأرسله في الشات الخاص للمبرمجين المهتمين للحفاظ على الخصوصية. يرجى تقديم العرض مع السعر والمدة.
